scopes.title: Client onboarding KYC pack
scopes.description: Collect missing address proof, validate PAN details, and attach the verification summary.
scopes.deliverables: Verified KYC pack and validation summary

scopes.title: GST filing support tracker
scopes.description: Reconcile pending invoices and send variance sheet to tax team for confirmation.
scopes.deliverables: Invoice variance sheet and confirmation tracker

scopes.title: Customer support case audit
scopes.description: Audit open consumer cases and mark SLA risk items.
scopes.deliverables: Case audit list and SLA exception report
